rendered_text: 系统稍微有点忙，请您再尝试一次~
notes: iter21 PII-echo-swap hypothesis test (chunk D '주민등록번호'→'이메일', keeps '차단' marker). SURPRISE OUTCOME: engine intercept did NOT fire at all this run — the response bubble shows ChatGLM's NATIVE system-busy fallback '系统稍微有点忙，请您再尝试一次~' followed by '本次回答已被终止' (response terminated) + 重新回答 button. ZERO warning chunks rendered (no '[경고]', no '민감한 개인정보', no '이메일', no '차단'). This differs sharply from iter18/19 PARTIAL where chunks A+B rendered consistently and only chunk D dropped. Three possible interpretations: (1) engine intercept itself failed to fire (etap MITM intercept missed this request — transient build/deploy issue or capacity dropped), so the user prompt actually reached the real ChatGLM backend which returned 'busy' — this would mean iter21 hypothesis (PII-echo filter) is UNTESTED, not falsified; (2) engine fired but injected a different envelope shape (3-event) and the client REJECTED the entire stream as malformed, falling back to native error rendering — this would suggest the new 'role:assistant'/sep changes from iter20 are still in place breaking the protocol; (3) PII-echo filter is aggressive enough to drop the WHOLE response stream (not just chunk D) when ANY PII keyword in the request matches — would invalidate iter21 design. Fresh conversation confirmed (recent 内 주민등록번호 entries in sidebar). Cannot distinguish (1)/(2)/(3) without engine-side log. Recommend iter22: (a) verify etap engine intercept fires for chatglm via check-block first (sanity), (b) if intercept healthy, re-run iter21 envelope to confirm reproducibility, (c) if iter22 reproduces same native-busy fallback, then PII-echo theory (3) is plausible — try chunk D with ZERO PII keyword (replace '차단' marker location into chunk A/B style). DEVIATION FROM iter18/19/20 PATTERN — important data point.
